criteria.note: AxxonMcpLogicControl dataclass mirrors AxxonMcpAudit pattern. _gate returns {status:disabled} when enabled=False (no wire call) and {status:gap} on wrong token (no wire call). Confirmed by GatingTests (3 tests all ok) and live-verify.txt [gate] line.
list_launchable_macros calls ListMacros, classifies launchable as mode.common present. test_classifies_launchable passes: m-manual launchable=True, m-auto launchable=False.
launch_macro gates, rejects empty macro_id (no wire call), on success returns {status:launched, macro_id}. LaunchMacroTests pass. Live: Fire macro launched.

change_arm_state: zero/negative timeout_s returns error with empty calls list (verified live in Python). Large timeout capped to ARM_TIMEOUT_CAP_S=300. Unknown state returns error, no wire call. Friendly states map disarm->CS_Disarm(0), arm->CS_Arm(1), arm_private->CS_ArmPrivate(2). Response includes auto_reverts:True. No code path can call ChangeArmState without a bounded, positive timeout.

register_logic_control_tools registers 4 tools (logic_control_connect_axxon_profile, list_launchable_macros, launch_macro, change_arm_state). Wired via --enable-logic-control CLI flag and logic_control param in create_server. Server import ok.
12 tests in test_axxon_mcp_logic_control.py all ok. Full suite: Ran 731 tests in 0.630s OK.
LaunchMacro and ChangeArmState both show live_status=tested-pass in api_methods.json with evidence citations. Corpus restamp dry-run reports 0 methods restamped (corpus already in sync).

notes: Sanitization check: rg for IPs/passwords/secrets in raw/live-verify.txt returned empty. All host/creds redacted; only object guids present. No biometric data. Full suite 731/731 green.
